deposit_request.title: Deposit Request
deposit_request.description: User cash package deposit request via InstaPay for manual admin approval of gold coins.

userId.description: The UID of the player requesting coins.

coins.description: Gold coins to grant the player (500 or 1100).

status.description: State of transaction approval inside Admin Panel.

transferCode.description: The reference/receipt/transaction ID entered by the player.

createdAt.description: When the deposit request was submitted.

updatedAt.description: When the request status was updated.

profile.title: Player Profile
profile.description: User profile with level, coins, and customization options.

userId.description: The unique user ID matching their Firebase Auth UID.

equippedCue.description: The visual design of the player's stick.

equippedTheme.description: The visual color palette of the table.

unlockedCues.description: Comma-separated list or JSON array of cue IDs available for stick customization.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

room.title: Match Game Room
room.description: The active billiard match instance between two players.

roomId.description: Unique game room code (6-digit alphanumeric or firestore ID).

hostId.description: User ID of the player setting up the room.

guestId.description: User ID of the opponent, or null if waiting for someone to join.

winnerId.description: The user ID of the victorious player.

turn.description: The user ID of the player whose turn it currently is.

turnExpiresAt.description: Epoch timestamp when the current turn timing expires.

lastShotBy.description: User ID of the player who performed the last shot.

ballsState.description: Serialized JSON array representing position and state of all 16 balls on the table.

hostBallGroup.description: The group of balls (solids or stripes) assigned to the host.

guestBallGroup.description: The group of balls (solids or stripes) assigned to the guest.

firstBallPocketedThisTurn.description: Optional info on balls pocketed during current turn to resolve groupings.

foulOccurred.description: Indicates if the last action resulted in a foul (giving ball-in-hand to the next player).

tableFeltColor.description: The customized fabric color for this table session.

createdAt.description: When the lobby room was initialized.

updatedAt.description: The last timestamp synchronization of gameplay state.

deposit_requests/{requestId}.description: Stores user coin package purchase requests for admin authorization.

profiles/{userId}.description: Stores user statistics, levels, customized themes, and achievements.

rooms/{roomId}.description: Synchronizes current active multiplayer billiard match instances and table layout state.

rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Instant chat logs exchanged between competing players on matching billiard tables.
